title: mabrya geniculata
intro: Mabrya geniculata, also known as the 'bushy pea-flower', is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mabrya geniculata include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of Mabrya geniculata are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various ailments and support overall health and well-being.
